sentences: <ENT_029> <REF_023> observes that <ENT_057>-style metric average precision (<ENT_092>) results for small objects on detection transformers at low <ENT_054> threshold values are better than CNNbased detectors.
It refines the predicted locations by utilizing local information, as incorrect bounding box location reduces performance on small objects.
<ENT_029> introduces the transformer-enhanced <ENT_075> (<ENT_051>) module, coarse layers, and fine layers into the decoder network of <ENT_008>.
The <ENT_051> module provides the same functionality as <ENT_075>, has non-local features E4 and E4 extracted from the backbone, and E5 features taken from the encoder output.
The features of the <ENT_051> module and the encoder network are fed to the decoder as input.
The decoder modules introduce a coarse block and a fine block.
The coarse block selects foreground features from the global context.
The fine block has two modules: adaptive scale-fusion (<ENT_093>) and local cross-attention (<ENT_094>), further refining coarse boxes.
In summary, these modules refine and enrich the features by fusing global and local information to improve detection transformer performance.
